headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -36.0)
key_insights: Fears trending up 29% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 139 quotes, including 104 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and annoyance.

• Despite the high quote volume, the score dropped significantly from yesterday's peak, suggesting less engagement per complaint.

• Both fears and optimism remain well below average, with fears plunging from positive to deeply negative overnight.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
